title: 1981-04-16_Pat_72.txt
key_claims: Dick defines the core salvific mechanism of Ditheon and 2-3-74: Christ literally enters the mind of a creature facing a death-crisis (retributive karma/astral determinism) and inserts a "blank sheet of paper" to nullify the karmic claim.
The creature does not die alone but is joined by Christ, becoming an apotheosized dual entity. God holds the worshiper's hand during the final journey.

The true Christian is someone possessing Ditheon: the *sedakah* (love/empathy) of the right brain combined with the logic of the left brain. He links this back to Philo's synthesis of Judaism and Hellenism.

Dick makes a massive theoretical leap: Valis's process of accelerating recombinant information is literally *Negentropy*. Valis is a growing, biologically viable macro-organism that absorbs negative entropy from its environment to avoid thermal equilibrium.
recurring_concepts: **Schizophrenia as Misunderstood Prophecy**: Dick refines his psychological theory, stating that true schizophrenia is a schizoid (left-brain) person being overwhelmed by raw right-brain affect. His own experience was the reverse—a right-brain person being invaded by supreme left-brain rationality.
**Change Rate Velocity Acceleration**: The concept that salvation/Valis is characterized by high-speed, compounding complexity that looks like a blur to lower cognitive levels.
reading_excerpt: Dick defines the core salvific mechanism of Ditheon and 2-3-74: Christ literally enters the mind of a creature facing a death-crisis (retributive karma/astral determinism) and inserts a "blank sheet of paper" to nullify the karmic claim.
